Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee heads South to Costa Rica and meets up with a wonderful group of friends who are the Reconte Hot Sause owners. The Costa Rican coastline is a perfect playground for this group as they explore traveling on a 50-foot catamaran, surf and fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Costa Rica Surf and Turf with Riconte Hot Sauce
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Ty Sjodin have so much fun in North Dakota where the feedbag is on.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fantastic Fishing In North Dakota
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Dan Lindner demonstrate how finding and catching magnum-sized mid-summer crappies can be easier than you think
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Summertime Crappies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The story of a Wisconsin soldier who reveals his real-life struggles as a 37-month prisoner of war during the Korean War.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Korean War POW Darrell Krenz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Young Female Anglers participate in the regional Angler Young Angler Tournament
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Young Anglers Tournament
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Extremely remote adventures on FishON! this season. Back to our roots with walleye fishing in Northern Ontario
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Northern Ontario Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman Pro Vs Joe Lake-Onondaga
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Lake-Onondaga
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew spend day two of their two and a half-day fishing trip on the El Dorado sportfishing boat out of Long Beach Sportfishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Tuna and Yellowtail Fishing on the El Dorado, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stoked On Fishing jumps on board the Top Gun 80 out of San Diego, California, for Stan Vanderburg's annual five-day Rod & Reel Radio charter. We go offshore and have an absolute blast. In part two, we run right into a Yellowfin Tuna school, and the boat goes bonkers.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Epic Five Day Fishing Charter on the Top One 80, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're heading over to the Detroit river this week to hook up with our good friend Jason Julien from Church Tackle. We'll be teaching the in's and out's of using his excellent boards to catch some walleye!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Detroit River Trolling
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe South Georgia Showdown_rd
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week we hit the river for the last time before the ice starts to take over. We show you tht ebest way to fish the rivers with 3 ways and boy do we get them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Fishing Rivers Using 3 Ways

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Fishing Rivers Using 3 Ways
Larry Smith Outdoors | Fishing Rivers Using 3 Ways
Larry Smith Outdoors | Fishing Rivers Using 3 Ways

Video.summary: Jim shows you how easy it is to build 3 different fish catching spinnerbaits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building Spinnerbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Salty Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Future is here. The time is now! Some of the best anglers and creators in the sport are teaming up for a live-streamed super derby like you’ve never witnessed before- with 6 spots in the Ultimate Angler Championship on the line - where first place takes home $500,000!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Future - A New Area of Competitive Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Being in the Right Place at the Right Time for Huge Bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | All About Timing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1
